prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约1087名、908名、1009名、996名、1088名。近五年位次在900–1100名区间内波动，2022年达到最高点（908名），2025年回落至1088名，整体呈小幅后移趋势，近两年稳定在1000–1100名之间。2025年基准位次为1088名；浙江大学在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年20人、2022年20人、2023年20人、2024年21人、2025年22人、2026年24人（依据2026年招生计划文件）。2026年较2025年增加2人，扩招幅度约9.1%，扩招有利于降低竞争烈度，对位次有轻微下移（数字增大）作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985工程、211工程、国家双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续六年位居全国第3名，稳居国内顶尖高校行列，对高分考生有持续吸引力；2026年高考周期内浙江大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风及校园安全事件共3件，但事件数量在58所高校中较少，且浙大作为顶尖名校，声誉韧性较强，对报考热度影响有限。抖音热度排名总榜第14位，评价为高热，短视频平台曝光度高，有助于维持报考关注度。历史投档异常方面，2021年有低关注记录（河南理科第五），2023年有中关注记录（湖南文科投档线641分），均属正常波动，未见明显断档或暴跌信号；浙江大学第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科多达39个，其中A+学科包括计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、化学工程与技术、机械工程、植物保护、生态学、管理科学与工程、药学、数学、外国语言文学等，学科实力极为突出，对考生有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等浙大优势专业大类持续高热推荐；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度稳定偏热；金融/财经/经济类分化观望。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年的65434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅增加，整体竞争加剧，但浙大位次处于全省前1000–1100名区间，顶尖考生群体受总人数增长的影响相对有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年基准位次1088名；2026年招生计划扩招2人（+9.1%），对位次有轻微下移作用；北京市考生总数大幅增加（+29.7%），但顶尖考生竞争格局变化有限；学校声誉偏负面但影响有限，抖音高热维持关注度；优势学科极强持续吸引高分考生。，考虑考生总数增加带来的竞争加剧，小幅上调15名，预测2026年最低录取位次约1162名，区间1029–1295名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（竺可桢学院图灵班）（含计算机科学与技术）
- 工科试验班（竺可桢学院混合班）（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、信息安全、人工智能等）
- 工科试验班（计算机）（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、信息安全）
- 人工智能（荣誉项目班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（信息）（含计算机科学与技术、信息安全、软件工程、光电信息科学与工程等）
- 工科试验班（EE类）（含电气工程及其自动化、电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、信息工程）
- 工科试验班（智能科学与创新）（含人工智能、智能工程与创意设计）
- 理科试验班类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学、物理学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会科学试验班（含数字金融双学士学位项目）（含经济学、财政学、金融学、法学等）
- 社会科学试验班（竺可桢学院人文社科实验班）（含经济学、财政学、金融学、法学等）
- 工科试验班（含过程装备与控制工程、车辆工程、机械工程、电气工程及其自动化等）
- 工科试验班（脑机智能创新班）（含心理学、生物医学工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1029–1295名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业可冲刺（尤其是竺可桢学院图灵班和混合班），三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如1029名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（1295名附近）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。浙江大学工科实力极强，计算机、电子信息、电气等专业就业前景广阔，社会科学试验班虽为三档但学科评估同样优秀，可根据个人兴趣灵活选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 1087, 908, 1009, 996, and 1088 respectively. Over the past five years, rankings fluctuated within the range of 900–1100, reaching the highest point in 2022 (908) and dropping back to 1088 in 2025, showing a slight overall backward trend, stabilizing between 1000–1100 in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 1088; the enrollment plan for Zhejiang University in Beijing's comprehensive category: 20 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 20 in 2023, 21 in 2024, 22 in 2025, and 24 in 2026 (based on the 2026 enrollment plan document). Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 2 students, an expansion rate of about 9.1%, which helps reduce competition intensity and has a slight downward effect on rankings (increasing numbers).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and national Double First-Class university. It has ranked 3rd nationally in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for six consecutive years from 2021 to 2026, firmly among the top domestic universities, with sustained appeal to high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving 3 incidents of academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety, but the number of incidents is relatively low among 58 universities, and as a top prestigious school, its reputation resilience is strong, with limited impact on application enthusiasm. Douyin heat ranking is 14th overall, rated as high heat, with high exposure on short video platforms, helping maintain application attention. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there was a low-attention record in 2021 (Henan science fifth) and a medium-attention record in 2023 (Hunan liberal arts admission line 641 points), both normal fluctuations, with no obvious gaps or sharp drops. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Zhejiang University has as many as 39 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Plant Protection, Ecology, Management Science and Engineering, Pharmacy, Mathematics, and Foreign Languages and Literature, with extremely outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other advantageous major categories of Zhejiang University continue to be highly recommended; Clinical Medicine, Stomatology and other medical majors have stable and slightly hot popularity; Finance/Finance/Economics are differentiated and wait-and-see. The total number of college entrance examination registrants in Beijing in 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, with a significant increase in the number of candidates and intensified overall competition, but Zhejiang University's ranking is in the top 1000–1100 range in the province, and the impact of total population growth on the top candidate group is relatively limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: baseline ranking in 2025 is 1088; enrollment plan expansion by 2 students in 2026 (+9.1%), with a slight downward effect on ranking; total number of candidates in Beijing significantly increased (+29.7%), but competition pattern among top candidates changes limitedly; school reputation slightly negative but with limited impact, Douyin high heat maintains attention; extremely strong advantageous disciplines continue to attract high-scoring candidates. Considering the intensified competition due to the increase in total candidates, a slight upward adjustment of 15 places, predicting the minimum admission ranking in 2026 to be about 1162, with a range of 1029–1295.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class) (including Computer Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Mixed Class) (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer) (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security)
- Artificial Intelligence (Honors Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information) (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Software Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (EE Category) (including Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Information Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Science and Innovation) (including Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Engineering and Creative Design)
- Science Experimental Class (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Physics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Social Science Experimental Class (including Digital Finance Dual Bachelor's Degree Program) (including Economics, Public Finance, Finance, Law, etc.)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class) (including Economics, Public Finance, Finance, Law, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (including Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Brain-Machine Intelligence Innovation Class) (including Psychology, Biomedical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1029–1295, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors can be a stretch (especially Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class and Mixed Class), and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1029), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1295), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as supplementary. Zhejiang University has extremely strong engineering strength, with majors like Computer, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering offering broad career prospects. Although the Social Science Experimental Class is Tier 3, its discipline evaluation is also excellent, so you can choose flexibly based on personal interests.
